headline: ICS Patch Tuesday July 2026: Siemens, Schneider Electric and Rockwell Automation patch dozens of vulnerabilities
CISA releases three ICS advisories July 9 covering Schneider Electric Easergy MiCOM Px40, PowerChute and OpenPLC v3
CISA releases six ICS advisories July 2 covering ST Engineering iDirect terminals, Mitsubishi CNC and more
UK NCSC CEO warns 75% of critical infrastructure cyberattacks are state-linked; Russia, China and Iran intensifying OT targeting
NIST SP-1339 OT Backup Quick Start Guide released, covering PLCs, DCS, SCADA and HMI backup and recovery strategies
Accenture acquires majority stake in Dragos at $3.25B valuation, plus runZero and NetRise, in $4.175B OT security deal
Anubis ransomware hit Italian Adriatic Port Authority, encrypting cargo and customs systems and demanding $10M ransom
MITRE releases Grid Watch, a software-only DNP3 power grid simulator for hands-on OT security training via Caldera
